registries.description: An open-source (MIT License) collection of smooth animated icons for your projects. Built with motion and lucide

registries.name: Manifest UI

registries.description: UI components and fully functional apps built with React, Next.js and Tailwind

registries.name: Intent UI
registries.description: Accessible React component library to copy, customize, and own your UI.

registries.name: kokonut/ui

registries.name: 8bitcn

registries.name: The Gridcn
registries.description: A Tron: Ares inspired theme and component library for shadcn/ui. 55+ components, 6 Greek god color themes, 3D effects, and HUD-style UI elements.

registries.name: RetroUI

registries.name: heroicons-animated

registries.name: shadcn-glass-ui

registries.name: Shadix UI
registries.description: Explore a custom registry of production-ready, animated components for shadcn/ui. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion for easy integration into your React projects.

registries.name: Eldora UI
registries.description: Eldora UI is a collection of re-usable components that you can copy and paste into your web apps. It primarily features components, blocks, and templates.

registries.name: React Bits
registries.description: An open source collection of animated, interactive & fully customizable React components for building memorable websites.

registries.name: JollyUI
registries.description: shadcn/ui compatible react aria components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Accessible. Customizable. Open Source.

registries.name: Algolia SiteSearch
registries.description: Opinionated search experiences for your website needs, powered by Algolia

registries.name: Better Upload
registries.description: Simple and easy file uploads for React. Upload directly to any S3-compatible service with minimal setup.

registries.name: UI TripleD
registries.description: Production-ready UI components, motion blocks, and landing page templates powered by shadcn/ui and Framer Motion.

registries.name: Shadcn Form Builder
registries.description: Create forms with Shadcn, react-hook-form and zod within minutes.

registries.name: useLayouts

registries.name: Aceternity UI

registries.name: framecn
